mainText:
Welcome to Bank of Entitlement, where your every whim is our command! Get ready to experience banking like never before-because you deserve it all!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, get this-it was a regular Tuesday morning, and I stroll into my local coffee shop like the VIP that I am. I waltz up to the counter, expecting my usual order to already be in the works. But to my utter shock, the barista looks at me like I'm just another nobody in line. I clear my throat, giving her the chance to rectify her mistake, but she just smiles and asks for my order.Now, normally, I wouldn't let such plebeian behavior bother me, but today, I was not to be trifled with. I take a deep breath, put on my best CEO face, and loudly declare, "Do you know who I am? I am Hot Josh, the mastermind behind Bank of Entitlement, where people like you should be grateful to serve me!" The barista's eyes widen, and she quickly scrambles to prepare my order, along with a complimentary pastry for my "inconvenience."As I savor my free treat, I can't help but feel a sense of satisfaction. For in that moment, I had asserted my rightful place at the top of the food chain, where entitlement reigns supreme. And all it took was a little reminder of who I truly am-a man of power, privilege, and undeniable entitlement.
